positive: A stylized, mystical celestial forest scene viewed from above. The central elements are glowing, ethereal mushroom clusters forming a winding path, surrounded by bioluminescent flora and stylized roots. The atmosphere is highly magical and whimsical, with dramatic contrast between deep indigo and vibrant cyan highlights. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, ideal for a repeating or single-placement apparel design. Minimalist silhouette style, strong clean lines, flat graphic design feel with deep gradients. Studio photography quality, clean print vector art, high contrast lighting, volumetric light shafts, vibrant color palette.
negative: blur, low resolution, poorly drawn, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, typography, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, dirty, messy, signature, cropped, abstract
